TextENGNew: "Jirou-san, you're awfully slow at getting changed for a man. Hmph."
Lounging on a deck chair with her alluring body on full display, casting sidelong glances at every man who walked by -- it was the seductive nurse from the Hinamizawa clinic, Miyo Takano.
"Mii-chan, look over there!@k@vS23/02/VTH_rena1052. It's Miyo Takano-san!!"
"That outrageous body is unmistakable!@k@vS23/03/VTH_mion1112. A flagrant violation of the Big Bust Prohibition Act!@k@vS23/03/VTH_mion1113. And just in time!"
"Oh my, if it isn't Mion-chan and friends.@k@vS23/09/VTH_takano1003. Hello there. What a coincidence running into you here."
"Oh ho ho ho!@k@vS23/04/VTH_satoko1044. Actually, Takano-san, we have a very juicy piece of information for you!"
"Wh-wh-what did you say?!@k@vS23/09/VTH_takano1005. The trunks Maebara-kun is wearing are actually a treasure from the ritual storehouse?!"
changeReason: Old translates 前原くん as 'Keiichi-kun' (given name) when the Japanese uses 'Maebara-kun' (family name); new correctly preserves the family name form of address.

TextENGNew: "...And if you retrieve them, I'll personally give you a private tour of the ritual storehouse."

"Hee hee hee, hehehehe!!@k@|@y@vS23/09/VTH_takano1007. ...That's an offer I simply cannot pass up...@k@vS23/09/VTH_takano1008. Hee hee hee. So you're telling me there are no restrictions on what weapons I may use to subdue him...?"
Takano grinned wickedly, then whipped out several syringes in each hand with a flourish!
"Huh? Yeah, sure...@k@|@y@vS23/03/VTH_mion1115. Wait, where did those syringes come from?@k@vS23/03/VTH_mion1116. And why do you have so many of them??"
"A medical professional is always prepared."
"L-liar...!"
"What flavor~ of curry~ are we having today~♪@k@vS23/22/VTH_chie1002. The curry shop at this pool is actually a hidden three-star gem."
She would go anywhere for curry -- even to the poolside without a companion. It was the magnificent curry connoisseur, teacher Rumiko Chie.
"Mii-chan, look over there!@k@vS23/02/VTH_rena1055. It's Chie-sensei!!"

"Just sitting around eating curry without even swimming -- that's definitely her!@k@|@y@vS23/03/VTH_mion1118. Her curves and swimsuit are practically weeping!@k@vS23/03/VTH_mion1119. Just what we need!"
"Oh dear, it's Sonozaki-san and friends.@k@vS23/22/VTH_chie1004. Hello there. Are you here for the curry as well?"
"A-as addicted to curry as always.@k@|@y@vS23/04/VTH_satoko1046. Chie-sensei, we have something you absolutely must hear!"
"R-really?!@k@vS23/22/VTH_chie1006. Maebara-kun has a pack of instant curry tucked inside his swim trunks?!"
changeReason: New correctly specifies レトルトカレー as 'instant curry' rather than just 'curry,' preserving the comedic specificity of the absurd claim.

TextENGNew: "...He said it feels nice and cool, and the curry smell even works as deodorant."
"U-u-unforgivable!!@k@vS23/22/VTH_chie1008. This is an unconscionable act of blasphemy against curry!!"
"O holy father, forgive this boy his foolishness...!!"
changeReason: Old translates 愚行 as 'act of ignorance' when it means 'foolish act/foolishness'; new's 'forgive this boy his foolishness' is more accurate.

TextENGNew: "But even if God forgives him, his teacher will not!!!"
changeReason: New translation preserves Chie referring to herself as 'his teacher' (先生は), maintaining the Japanese convention of self-reference by role, which the old translation's generic 'I' loses.

TextENGNew: Enraged, Chie-sensei raised both arms into a fighting stance, three T-square rulers clutched in each hand like claws!
changeReason: New includes the simile まるで爪のよう ('like claws') describing how the T-square rulers looked, which the old translation omits.

TextENGNew: "Um... so where did those T-square rulers come from?@k@vS23/03/VTH_mion1121. And why do you have so ridiculously many of them??"
"M-Mion-san... that's a dangerous question to ask her right now..."
"Y-you're right..."
"Despite never appearing in the original story at all,@k@vS23/06/VTH_shion1002. I do actually have friends at the Okinomiya school, you know."
changeReason: Old misreads the sentence as Shion saying she's currently at the pool with Okinomiya friends, but the Japanese (一応、私も興宮の学校に友人いるんですよねー) is Shion asserting she has friends at the Okinomiya school — a meta-comment about her character's off-screen social life.

TextENGNew: "And today I came to the pool with some of them."
"Who cares about some never-before-mentioned backstory?!@k@vS23/03/VTH_mion1124. Shion, I need your help!!"

"I really wouldn't mind if Kei-chan turned into a creepy narcissist.@k@vS23/06/VTH_shion1005. Besides, Sis, you're the one who keeps calling him nothing more than a "guy friend."@k@vS23/06/VTH_shion1006. So what's the problem?"
"U-umm! H-hey, don't tease me at a time like this!!@k@vS23/03/VTH_mion1126. This is an emergency!!"
"Hmm, what to do?@k@vS23/06/VTH_shion1008. This only benefits you, Sis. What's in it for me~?"
"Auuuuuu!!@k@vS23/03/VTH_mion1128. F-f-fine, I'll owe you one! Just consider it a favor!!@k@vS23/03/VTH_mion1129. Just help us already!!"

"...Good grief. You're really that desperate?@k@|@y@vS23/06/VTH_shion1010. Well, I suppose I can't resist such touching sisterly devotion. I'll lend you a hand today for just one favor owed.@k@vS23/06/VTH_shion1011. But Kei-chan might not come out of this completely unscathed, you know?"
"Hold on -- why did you bring a stun gun to a pool?!?!"
changeReason: Old translates スタンガン as 'taser' (a brand name for a specific type of device) while new correctly uses 'stun gun,' matching the Japanese katakana loan word directly.

TextENGNew: "At my old school, they told us to keep one on us at all times -- like a student ID♪"
"...Go back to where you came from."
